top_signals.title: Chairman Warsh abstains from giving rate forecast as several members signal a hike in 2026
top_signals.summary: The median projection called for the federal funds rate to end 2026 at 3.8%, a quarter percentage point above the current target range.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed Getting US Ready for Rate Hikes, JPMorgan's Michele Says
top_signals.summary: Bob Michele, JPMorgan Asset Management's global head of fixed income, says the Federal Reserve's policy-setting Federal Open Market Committee is showing a hawkish tilt after its decision to leave rates unchanged. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance: The Fed Decides." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Expeditors International to lay off 230 tech workers
top_signals.summary:
Seattle-based logistics company Expeditors International is cutting more than 200 IT jobs.

The post Expeditors International to lay off 230 tech workers appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: Poland weighs joining X-BAT autonomous vertical-takeoff fighter program
top_signals.summary: The announcement comes as the Polish government is mulling plans to acquire up to 32 new fighter jets.

top_signals.title: EU commits over €338 million for global ocean protection at Our Ocean Conference in Kenya
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 17 Jun 2026 The European Union has today committed €338.35 million to support ocean conservation, sustainable fisheries and maritime security at the Our Ocean Conference 2026.
